reviews.text: Great product, I just ordered the wrong one.  He does have a separate listing for Elgato Key Light Air, my mistake.  He was very responsive and corrected the situation immediately.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Yoo, this fits my Elgato Key Light perfectly.  The grid diffuses light to only me or my subject and not the full background.  Now my LED lights in the background look even better.  This is a quality product and I definitely recommend.
